title: Nami Escapes Kureha’s Room
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on nami escapes kureha’s room, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Nami Escapes Kureha’s Room. Wapol loses control of the castle and the people’s fear as Luffy, Chopper, and the others push the tyrant back. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: unacceptable... I'll have every last one of their heads for this!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This isn't the time to be napping around. I have to escape while the "Dr. Kureha" is gone...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no way we can afford to stay here for 3 whole days!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You must be one of Stravhat's crewmates, am i right...!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I don't have the faintest idea what you're talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm just a random Navigator passing by.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: NGHH! Seems I must've put on a few too many pounds recently!

summary: This part highlights nami escapes kureha’s room and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
